pull.message: This GitHub proof does not create PULLS snapshots. It reads AWS EventBridge-generated 15-minute pull history from DynamoDB.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

mlbB10Build.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default
mlbB10Build.message: MLB-B1.0 refused because frozen same-slate history did not produce 2 MLB_STRONG plus 1 MLB_LEAN/STRONG. Pull coverage is incomplete versus the 1:00 AM ET HOT capture policy. The 2-hour slate build deadline has already passed.
mlbB10Build.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.

build.message: Built after 12 snapshots from top available ranked signals. Leg grades remain honest and are not promoted to strong.

pullDiagnostics.policy: Every requested sport with active same-day games or matches must have convertible markets for timestamped storage. Diagnostic probes do not create snapshots.
